findings.evidence: `rg -n "abbrev (lowerFace|upperFace|vertices|characteristicWeight|characteristicLowerFaceExponent|characteristicUpperFaceExponent)" code/TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/CubeGenerator.lean` hits lines 71, 77, 122, 168, 192, and 197; those bodies are not needed for consumers because the file already exposes the characteristic and projection lemmas at lines 99-116, 132-134, 172-229, and 233-245.
findings.fix: Make `lowerFace`, `upperFace`, `vertices`, `characteristicWeight`, `characteristicLowerFaceExponent`, and `characteristicUpperFaceExponent` opaque `def`/`noncomputable def`s, keeping the existing `*_base`, `*_directions`, `mem_vertices`, `*_mk`, `*_natCast`, and zero-iff lemmas as the public characterization API.
findings.issue: The public face and bundled characteristic constants are `abbrev`s, so downstream code can unfold through the new bundled API to the current implementation instead of using the intended lemmas.

summary: The bundled characteristic API is now present, but several public constants still expose their implementation by being abbreviations even though the file provides the projection and characteristic restatement lemmas consumers need.
